title: Questions from Quarantine: Time to Get A Flu Shot?
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine.
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine . result.main_content_en: The article introduces a weekly web series titled 'Questions from Quarantine,' hosted by Juliette Kayyem and Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux from the Security and Global Health Project. The series aims to provide public advice on managing health and sanity during the global crisis, specifically addressing viewer-submitted questions. It encourages audience participation via social media using the hashtag #QuestionsFromQuarantine. The piece, published by the Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs at Harvard Kennedy School, serves as promotional content for the series, highlighting its focus on coronavirus-related public health guidance. The context suggests the discussion includes timely health measures like flu vaccination amidst the pandemic.
result.main_content_zh: 本文介绍了一个名为“隔离问题”的每周网络系列节目，由安全与全球健康项目的朱丽叶·凯耶姆和玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持。该系列旨在为全球危机期间如何保持健康和心理稳定提供公众建议，并专门解答观众提交的问题。文章鼓励观众通过社交媒体使用#QuestionsFromQuarantine标签参与互动。该内容由哈佛大学肯尼迪学院贝尔弗科学与国际事务中心发布，是对该系列的宣传推广，强调其专注于冠状病毒相关的公共卫生指导。文章背景暗示讨论内容包括在疫情期间及时采取流感疫苗接种等健康措施。
